title: stipa pringlei
intro: Stipa pringlei, also known as Pringle's needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa pringlei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Stipa pringlei is typically prepared as a tea or infusible in herbal medicine, and can also be made into a tincture or salve for topical application.
